projects.name: Water Demand Forecasting (Time-Series)
projects.description: Forecasting framework comparing ARIMA and LSTM models on large-scale water-demand time series. Handled missing values and seasonality, tuned hyperparameters against RMSE/MAE, and built Matplotlib and Power BI dashboards for demand monitoring — improving forecast accuracy ~30%.

projects.name: Synthetic Data Generation with GANs
projects.description: Generative adversarial network experiments for producing synthetic tabular and image data, with training notebooks and evaluation of sample fidelity.

projects.name: Computer Vision Projects
projects.description: A collection of computer-vision notebooks covering image classification and object-detection workflows in Python.

projects.name: Million-Parameter LLM from Scratch
projects.description: A ~1M-parameter language model built from first principles — tokenization, transformer blocks, and the training loop implemented from scratch in a notebook.

projects.name: MLOps Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end MLOps setup with containerized training and serving, infrastructure-as-code (Terraform/HCL), and shell automation for reproducible deployment.

projects.name: Multimodal Live RAG (Voice)
projects.description: Real-time multimodal retrieval-augmented-generation assistant with voice input and streaming responses over a live RAG pipeline.
